title: MT Educare Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: MT Educare Global Group is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MT Educare Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About MT Educare Global Group:
MT Educare Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MT Educare Global Group!
